[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2017-07-13
[TITLE]: Fearless Scots model who lost BOTH her legs to deadly flesh-eating bug is first UK double amputee to stomp catwalk
[METADATA/INTRO]: A SCOTTISH model who lost both her legs to a potentially deadly flesh-eating bug has become the first British double amputee to walk the catwalk. Stacy Paris, 31, was first diagnosed with necrotising fasciitis in 2009 after a holiday in...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Stacy, from Bridge of Allan in Stirlingshire, Scotland, said: “I’m the ambassador of Models of Diversity who campaign for a wider variety of people represented in the fashion industry. 
 most read in living 
 “In the fashion industry, everyone seems to be beautiful, tall and a size two, but this doesn’t represent most people in reality. 
 “Models of Diversity tend to be like ‘I’m a model and I just happen to have this disability’. It is more about representing the model but not seeing only their disability. 
 “Modelling was never something I wanted to do but then a couple of years passed and I did a couple of fashion shows and now I’m the only double amputee model in the UK.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Stephenie Rodriguez: How a business trip changed the Sydney socialite’s life
[METADATA/INTRO]: This was published 4 years ago ‘Completely unimaginable’: How a business trip changed Stephenie’s life...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: But not the Chanels? “No, they were my first Mother’s Day present. There was no way I was ever going to part with them.” 
 We’re sitting on black leather sofas in her tasteful apartment on the 42nd floor of a modern complex in Sydney’s central business district. On one wall hangs an artwork by her friend Athena “X” Levendi, a former star of the TV show The Real Housewives of Sydney. “It speaks to me about transformation,” Rodriguez says of the painting, which depicts the human soul going through different phases. Her 15-year-old son Constantine sits nearby with headphones on, and from a corner, a space-age-looking massage chair occasionally speaks to us. “Oh, I call her Alice, ignore her,” Rodriguez says as the voice-reactive lounge offers its services.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2023-01-23
[TITLE]: I'm a triple amputee and a hot model — nothing holds me back
[METADATA/INTRO]: I’m a triple amputee and a hot model — nothing holds me back See more of our coverage in your search results....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: After being fitted for a prosthetic leg, Salcedo started to work out and soon became hooked on exercise. 
 “I never thought I’d be an influential person for other people,” she told Viral Press of her unexpected career as a model and influencer. “But I like to share my life with others. I like people writing to me and asking me questions, for them to know that they can count on me.” 
 Salcedo, who lives in Guayaquil, was spotted by a modeling scout at the age of 19, and soon became in demand in the industry in spite of her missing limbs.
